title: Thamassh
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''thamassh''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] creature. Its scent glands were used to emit vapor used in purification ceremonies, such as being admitted to see the [[Supreme Overlord]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''

[[Category:Creatures of unspecified biology]]
[[Category:Creatures of unspecified diet]]
[[Category:Species of undefined sentience]]
